who: construction project accountants processing 5–15 subcontractor payrolls/month
offer: For construction project accountants processing 5–15 subcontractor payrolls/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We simplify the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of subcontractor hours and payroll.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project accountants
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to construction project accountants with demo video
Community forums where accountants share tools
try_it: Let users manually enter subcontractor hours and report discrepancies
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
